content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.93%, Bank Nifty -0.88%, VIX +7.7% to 18.14 — clear risk-off tape with auto/realty/energy leading down. Pharma and IT showing relative strength as defensive/INR-hedge plays. CPI print and DRREDDY/CIPLA earnings tomorrow create binary event risk on multiple held names.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold ETF, -1.2% within normal noise. SL 121 is 2% below CMP — respect it. Geopolitical risk premium intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Current stored SL 828 = +1% above entry (already at breakeven+). CMP 840, gap to SL ~1.5% — within trail discipline. Q4 strong (PAT +18.3%), at 52w high. Holding — no MODIFY needed as values match stored. Emitting HOLD instead via this no-change MODIFY would be wasted signal — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.2% unrealized. Stored SL 1357.20 sits BELOW CMP 1372.50 by only ~1.1% — already locked-in win. Per trail-gap discipline (Rule, 1% min below CMP), keeping SL at 1340 gives ~2.4% room for normal intraday noise while still locking in +6.4% profit. Target 1420 reasonable. Actually — current SL 1357 is tighter than my proposed 1340, which would LOOSEN — engine will reject. Reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: stored SL 1357.20 already locks +7.8% from entry 1259. CMP 1372.50 — gap 1.1% which is at the tight edge of trail-gap discipline. Cannot loosen SL (engine rejects), and tightening further risks self-stopout on intraday noise. Hold as-is, accept the SL fires if breached."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1630 sits ABOVE CMP 1630.60 by only 0.04% — verified arithmetic: 1630 < 1630.60 by 0.60, SL is BELOW CMP marginally. Position is at virtual breakeven with tight SL. Pharma DRREDDY/CIPLA results tomorrow are sector read-across not direct. Hold; SL will fire on any pullback which is acceptable given +0.5% unrealized."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% unrealized. SL 2760 is ~1.3% below CMP 2795.70 — within trail-gap discipline tolerance. Q4 strong (FY26 PAT +47%), refrigerant project scaled up. Specialty chem differentiated story holding vs sector peers. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.4% mild drawdown. SL 8950 is 1.3% below CMP 9053 — within tolerance. Q4 print mixed (revenue +27% but PAT only +6.3%, margin compression). 3.3x volume today suggests accumulation. Hold to SL or target 9550."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.6% drawdown, within normal noise. SL 10440 is 1.3% below CMP 10579 — close to trail-gap floor but acceptable. Buyback at 12000/share (record date May 29) provides downside cushion. Q4 PAT +34% standalone. Hold; auto sector weak today is the noise the SL was sized for."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.5% drawdown. SL 468 is 2.2% below CMP 478.45 — healthy gap. Q4 mixed (volume growth 6% lags Marico). Defensive FMCG; sector relative strength supportive. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.7% unrealized at 52w high. Stored SL 1250 = +2% above entry (breakeven+). Tightening modestly to 1255 — gap to CMP 1271.50 is 1.3%, within trail-gap discipline. Locks in +2.4% minimum. Pharma momentum strong, FY26 PAT +148%."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.5% drawdown, within noise. SL 1198 is 2.4% below CMP 1228.80 — healthy gap. Q4 strong (PAT +21.5%, India volume +16%, +6.27% earlier session). Defensive FMCG with earnings catalyst out. Hold to SL or target 1330."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.7% unrealized. SL 850 is 1.9% below CMP 866.70 — healthy gap. At all-time high with 3.2x volume — strong accumulation. Q4 PAT +32%, order book +61% YoY. Hold; cannot loosen SL but no need to tighten with this gap."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive holding, SL respect."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+ (828 vs entry 820). At 52w high, FMCG resilient."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1357.20 already locks +7.8% gain; trail-gap to CMP 1372 is 1.1% — at floor of trail discipline. Cannot loosen, tightening further risks self-stopout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL essentially at breakeven; pharma sector momentum continuing."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Specialty chem holding well; Q4 catalyst out."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Mild drawdown; 3.3x volume suggests accumulation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback at 12000 provides downside cushion; auto sector noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive FMCG; SL has room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 1250 to 1255; modest tighten, locks +2.4% min, 1.3% gap to CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong; SL has 2.4% room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "ATH, strong accumulation; SL gap healthy."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH-rated candidates not admitted this cycle with reasons: (1) TATACONSUM cmod +0.12 — already held, no add given +6.27% intraday move is extended. (2) BAJAJ-AUTO cmod +0.10 — already held. (3) COFORGE cmod +0.07, WOCKPHARMA +0.06, MARICO +0.05, CGPOWER +0.05, POLYCAB +0.05, SRF +0.04 — all already held. (4) TORNTPHARM cmod 0.00 — board meeting May 22 (capital raise) is dilution overhang, not actionable. (5) LAURUSLABS cmod -0.03 — already held, valuation stretched 70x P/E. (6) MRPL cmod -0.05 — no dividend negative surprise, OMC headwinds. (7) DABUR cmod 0.00 — already held, volume growth lags peers. Net: the BULLISH cohort surfaced today is overwhelmingly names already in book. Deployment 45% with ~₹350K remaining deployable. CPI tomorrow + VIX +7.7% argues for measured admit; no qualifying NEW name passes the bar today.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-diversified across pharma (WOCKPHARMA, LAURUSLABS), FMCG (MARICO, DABUR, TATACONSUM), IT (COFORGE), chemicals (SRF), capital goods (CGPOWER, POLYCAB), auto (BAJAJ-AUTO), gold ETF (GOLDBEES). Pharma defensive cluster ~9% of book, capital goods cluster ~10% — within limits. Unrealized P&L +₹3,635, realized +₹2,568 today. VIX spike + CPI binary tomorrow justifies measured stance — not zero admits, but high bar. HFCL pending LIMIT order from 7616m ago (5+ days) is STALE — should cancel."
}
